creator: tkato@prontomail.ne.jp
text:
* Removed (unnecessary) dependancy on GNU gettext
* Modified install path of configuration files from lib/ to etc/
* Fixed some files to set file permission properly

New file:
patches/patch-al  patches/patch-am  patches/patch-an  patches/patch-ao
patches/patch-ap  patches/patch-aq  patches/patch-ar  patches/patch-as
patches/patch-at

Note:
PRs of ports/14769 and ports/14796 would be closed with this update.
